chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1750 of 2017 Shamshad Ali Shaikh Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA 8911/17 3. For orders on CMA 8912/17 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 15.01.2021 Mr. Faizan Mansoor for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel appearing for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
